address.Address: Expressway, A-11, Block A, Sector 132, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India

school_address.streetAddress: Expressway, A-11, Block A, Sector 132, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India

reviews.author: 1ce_edits
reviews.review_body: I am writing this review to tell the school to change the dispersal system , the dispersal system causes alot of traffic jams and it is a hassle for the parents. I will not change this review until the school does something about it's dispersal system. I have no problem with the academics of this school , the academics department is quite good but the dispersal system is one of the worst I've seen in any school .

reviews.author: Mamta Gupta
reviews.review_body: I would like to thank to  JBM GLOBAL SCHOOL for the caring and supportive environment for children. I would personally like to thank the Ritika ma'am of class 1. She is very knowledgeable in her subject and always encourages students to express themselves creatively.

reviews.author: Arvind Arya
reviews.review_body: Very Bad Admission Process..!! I Faced Very Bad Experience Regarding This School Sometimes They Say Something And Sometimes They Say Something They Testing The Student During Admission Process Deeply Same Likes A Doctor Testing A Patient Deeply  I Think There's A Issue Of Donation So As Per My Knowledge This Sounds Not Good By School And I Faced Really Bad Experience About School .. Also They Try To Makes Pressure On Parents By Saying Student Not Doing Good During Admission Process Even Student Was Doing Good As Per My Knowledge It's Better To Go Other School Options.

reviews.author: Mandakini Gusain
reviews.review_body: We are really happy that we chose JBM school for our daughter. The school focus is on the overall development of the child, I’m glad that my daughter is getting equal opportunity to explore academics, sports and co-curicular activities. A special mention for all the pre primary teachers. We can see the efforts & hard work they put on a child for his/her development. I must say that the  school has one of the best teachers in pre primary. Keep doing good work.

reviews.author: Subha Saxsena
reviews.review_body: My overall experience till now is very good with the school. Recently attended there coffee morning event and it was great. Thankyou so much saveena ma’am for putting in all your efforts and hardwork for making our children perform so well(Class Lkg A). The event was really wonderful and a great experience.

reviews.author: Diya Bisht
reviews.review_body: *feedback Of coffee morning* -It was a wonderful day. Every teacher worked very hard, which was evident in the performance. The concept of the dance and the narration were excellent.thank you Saveena ma’am for your support (LKG-A).

reviews.author: Gaurav Aggarwal
reviews.review_body:
I have seen first school whose receptionist  is encouraging that parents are mandate to speak English with their kids. I went with my 2.5 year son to enquire about school  , my son spoke our national flag in hindi and the receptionist  was like we encourage parents to speak English.
This is shame , where our prime minister is giving world speech in hindi but school is encouraging  English as a medium. I saw photos of Kapil dev , wrestler sushil kumar, ram dev I am not sure whether all these people are fluent in English .
I feel values should be above language.

reviews.author: Deepika Khatri
reviews.review_body: It’s really been pleasure of having Mrs Ritika Rawat as the class teacher of my daughter (class 1). She really humble and polite with kids. Focuses of academic and skilled activities equally. Participation of every child is really remarkable and credit goes to their class teacher for all their support, guidance and patience. Thanks Ritika ma’am and JBM team.

reviews.author: Saanvi Nagar
reviews.review_body:
This is the school were you get everything.
The school is very good in academics and sports and I am a JBMites

reviews.author: WHÎTË DÈVÎL
reviews.review_body: Very nicely organised and planned academic programme. Teachers give their 100% and we are very greatful to them, the coordinator and principal. The staff is also very supportive. Thankyou for nurturing our children's love for learning.
